description: A wide graphic on a blue background featuring a large faint Department of Homeland Security seal at the right. White text at the upper left reads Fraud related to the 24-month Optional Practical Training extension for F-1 students with qualifying STEM degrees. Below it, smaller text reads TODAY | 11:30 AM ET, and large bold text reads PRESS CONFERENCE.
